description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/journal.json to correct JE-1002's Cash credit from 250.00 to 200.00, matching the 200.00 Rent Expense debit. All three entries then balance, so check_balance.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_balance.py: JE-1002 unbalanced (total_debit=200.0, total_credit=250.0). Correcting the Cash credit line from 250.00 to 200.00 so the rent payment entry balances. Not touching check_balance.py.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_balance.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
